evals.prompt: I sell a $297 course. Should I offer 30% or 50% affiliate commissions?
evals.expected_output: Analysis of commission rate tradeoffs considering margins, competitive rates, and affiliate motivation, with a recommendation and supporting rationale.

assertions.name: margin_analysis
assertions.description: Must discuss profit margins as a factor in choosing commission rates

assertions.name: tiered_commissions
assertions.description: Must suggest tiered commissions or VIP rates for top performers

assertions.name: cookie_duration
assertions.description: Must mention cookie duration as part of the commission strategy

evals.prompt: How do I recruit affiliates for my SaaS product?
evals.expected_output: Multi-channel affiliate recruitment strategy covering existing customers, influencers, and affiliate networks, with SaaS-specific considerations like recurring commissions.

assertions.name: existing_customers
assertions.description: Must recommend recruiting existing customers as affiliates

assertions.name: recurring_commissions
assertions.description: Must discuss recurring commissions for SaaS subscription models

assertions.name: platform_recommendation
assertions.description: Must recommend at least one SaaS-focused affiliate platform (PartnerStack, FirstPromoter, or Rewardful)

evals.prompt: Set up a two-tier affiliate program in Groove
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guidance for configuring a two-tier affiliate program in GrooveAffiliate with commission rates for both tiers.

assertions.name: grooveaffiliate_reference
assertions.description: Must reference GrooveAffiliate as the affiliate management tool in Groove

assertions.name: tier2_explanation
assertions.description: Must explain how Tier 2 commissions work for sub-affiliates

assertions.name: commission_rates
assertions.description: Must suggest specific commission rate ranges for both tiers
